title: The Coding Club's First Real App

all.en: Yu-chen founded the school coding club at the start of the autumn semester.
all.zh: 宇辰在秋季學期之初創立了學校的程式設計社團。

all.en: Only four students showed up on the first Tuesday afternoon in the computer lab.
all.zh: 第一個星期二下午，電腦教室只來了四個學生。

all.en: He felt a little disappointed but decided to make every meeting genuinely useful.
all.zh: 他有點失望，但決定讓每次聚會都真正有用。

all.en: By the end of October, word had spread, and twelve students were attending weekly.
all.zh: 到了十月底，消息傳開了，每週有十二位學生來參加。

all.en: Their new advisor, Ms. Chen, suggested they build something that could actually help students.
all.zh: 他們的新指導老師陳老師建議他們做一個能真正幫助學生的東西。

all.en: After a long brainstorm, they chose to create a simple campus lost-and-found app.
all.zh: 經過長時間的腦力激盪，他們選擇做一個簡單的校園失物招領應用程式。

all.en: Yu-chen sketched out the basic screens on big white paper taped across the wall.
all.zh: 宇辰在貼在牆上的大白紙上畫出基本的畫面草圖。

all.en: His friend Po-ya, who loved design, started picking colors and friendly little icons.
all.zh: 他熱愛設計的朋友柏雅，開始挑選顏色和可愛的小圖示。

all.en: The team split into three groups: front-end design, back-end database, and user testing.
all.zh: 團隊分成三組：前端設計、後端資料庫和使用者測試。

all.en: None of them had ever finished a real app before, so everyone felt slightly afraid.
all.zh: 他們之中沒人真正完成過一個應用程式，所以每個人都有點害怕。

all.en: Yu-chen watched online tutorials at night and shared the best ones in their group chat.
all.zh: 宇辰晚上看線上教學影片，並在他們的群組聊天中分享最好的幾支。

all.en: The first version crashed every time a user tried to upload a photo of a lost item.
all.zh: 第一個版本每次使用者試圖上傳遺失物品的照片時就會當掉。

all.en: Po-ya stayed after school for three days hunting down the stubborn image-handling bug.
all.zh: 柏雅放學後留下了三天，追查那個頑固的圖片處理錯誤。

all.en: When she finally fixed it, the whole team cheered like their school had won a championship.
all.zh: 當她終於修好時，整個團隊歡呼得像他們學校贏了冠軍一樣。

all.en: They invited ten classmates from different grades to try the early version of the app.
all.zh: 他們邀請了十位不同年級的同學試用這個應用程式的早期版本。

all.en: The testers loved the cute design but complained that searching was painfully slow.
all.zh: 測試者喜歡可愛的設計，但抱怨搜尋速度慢得令人痛苦。

all.en: Yu-chen rewrote the search function and improved the speed by nearly five hundred percent.
all.zh: 宇辰重寫了搜尋功能，速度提升了將近百分之五百。

all.en: Ms. Chen connected them with a parent who worked as a real software engineer downtown.
all.zh: 陳老師為他們聯繫了一位在市區擔任真正軟體工程師的家長。

all.en: He gave them honest, detailed feedback about clean code and protecting user privacy.
all.zh: 他針對乾淨的程式碼和保護使用者隱私給了他們誠實又詳細的回饋。

all.en: His comments stung at first, but the team rewrote large parts to follow his advice.
all.zh: 他的評論一開始讓人刺痛，但團隊重寫了大量內容以採納他的建議。

all.en: By December, the app had a clean login system, a photo gallery, and a reporting feature.
all.zh: 到了十二月，這個應用程式有了乾淨的登入系統、照片庫和回報功能。

all.en: They named it FindIt, with a simple yellow flashlight icon as their cheerful logo.
all.zh: 他們將它命名為 FindIt，標誌是一個簡單的黃色手電筒圖示，充滿活力。

all.en: Launch day was scheduled for the Friday before the winter break started.
all.zh: 上線日訂在寒假開始前的星期五。

all.en: During the school morning announcement, the principal personally introduced the app to everyone.
all.zh: 在學校晨間廣播中，校長親自向大家介紹了這個應用程式。

all.en: Within the first hour, over two hundred students had downloaded the new yellow icon.
all.zh: 上線後一小時內，已有超過兩百位學生下載了那個新的黃色圖示。

all.en: By lunch, a missing earphone case had already been reunited with its happy owner.
all.zh: 到了午餐時間，一個遺失的耳機盒已經回到它開心的主人手中。

all.en: A first-year girl wrote a kind thank-you message that made Yu-chen's whole afternoon brighter.
all.zh: 一位一年級女生寫了一則溫暖的感謝訊息，讓宇辰整個下午都變得明亮。

all.en: However, the server became overloaded around three o'clock and briefly slowed to a crawl.
all.zh: 然而，伺服器在大約三點時負荷過重，短暫地慢得像爬行一樣。

all.en: Yu-chen quickly upgraded their hosting plan using saved money from the club's small budget.
all.zh: 宇辰用社團小額預算存下的錢，迅速升級了他們的主機方案。

all.en: By the next morning, everything ran smoothly, and reports of recovered items kept arriving.
all.zh: 到了隔天早上，一切運行順暢，找回物品的回報持續傳來。

all.en: The local newspaper sent a reporter who interviewed Yu-chen and Po-ya in the lab.
all.zh: 當地報社派了一位記者，在實驗室裡採訪了宇辰和柏雅。

all.en: Suddenly, twenty new students wanted to join the coding club for the next semester.
all.zh: 突然間，二十位新學生想在下學期加入程式設計社團。

all.en: Yu-chen realized that one small, useful idea could grow into something genuinely meaningful.
all.zh: 宇辰領悟到，一個小而實用的點子，能成長為真正有意義的事物。

all.en: He stayed late on the last day, organizing notes and planning their next ambitious project.
all.zh: 他在最後一天待到很晚，整理筆記並規劃他們下一個野心勃勃的專案。

all.en: Outside the window, snow began to fall, gently covering the empty school courtyard below.
all.zh: 窗外開始下雪，輕輕覆蓋著下方空無一人的校園中庭。

all.en: Over winter break, Yu-chen drafted a roadmap to add a chat function for verifying ownership.
all.zh: 寒假期間，宇辰起草了一份藍圖，計畫新增聊天功能以驗證物品歸屬。

all.en: Po-ya designed a friendly mascot, a tiny dog named Sniffer, to greet new users on screen.
all.zh: 柏雅設計了一個友善的吉祥物，一隻名叫嗅嗅的小狗，在畫面上歡迎新使用者。

all.en: When the new semester began, twenty fresh members joined the club's first orientation meeting.
all.zh: 新學期開始時，二十位新成員加入了社團的第一次說明會。

all.en: Yu-chen split them into pairs and assigned each pair a simple starter coding exercise.
all.zh: 宇辰把他們兩人分一組，並分派每組一個簡單的入門程式練習。

all.en: Ms. Chen secured a small grant so the club could finally buy proper development laptops.
all.zh: 陳老師爭取到一筆小額補助，社團終於能購買合適的開發筆電。

all.en: A nearby high school heard about FindIt and asked to license the source code for free.
all.zh: 鄰近的高中聽說了 FindIt，請求免費授權使用其原始碼。

all.en: Yu-chen happily agreed, requesting only credit and feedback as the campus rollout expanded.
all.zh: 宇辰欣然同意，只要求在校園推廣擴大時給予署名與回饋。

all.en: By spring break, three schools were using the app and sharing recovery statistics online.
all.zh: 到了春假，三所學校都在使用這個應用程式，並在線上分享尋回統計資料。

all.en: Po-ya designed colorful weekly infographics that the principal proudly displayed on her wall.
all.zh: 柏雅設計了色彩繽紛的每週資訊圖表，校長自豪地把它們掛在自己的牆上。

all.en: Yu-chen sat back in his chair and thought that building useful things felt amazing.
all.zh: 宇辰靠回椅背，心想做出實用的東西感覺真的太棒了。

all.en: A national education organization noticed FindIt and invited the team to present at their conference.
all.zh: 一個全國性的教育組織注意到 FindIt，邀請團隊在他們的研討會上發表。

all.en: Yu-chen practiced his presentation slides in front of his bedroom mirror for nearly two weeks.
all.zh: 宇辰在臥室鏡子前練習簡報投影片將近兩週。

all.en: On the day of the talk, three hundred teachers and principals filled the large lecture hall.
all.zh: 演講當天，三百位老師和校長擠滿了大型講堂。

all.en: Po-ya joined him on stage to demo the app live with a wireless screen mirroring tool.
all.zh: 柏雅和他一起上台，用無線螢幕投影工具實機示範該應用程式。

all.en: The audience applauded loudly when a student in the back successfully reported a found wallet.
all.zh: 當後排一位學生成功回報撿到一個錢包時，全場熱烈鼓掌。

all.en: After the talk, six more schools requested access to the source code for their own campuses.
all.zh: 演講結束後，又有六所學校請求取用原始碼，要在自己的校園使用。

all.en: Yu-chen drafted a simple open-source license that protected the project while encouraging sharing.
all.zh: 宇辰草擬了一份簡單的開源授權條款，既保護專案又鼓勵分享。

all.en: Ms. Chen quietly framed a small thank-you note from the principal and hung it in the lab.
all.zh: 陳老師悄悄地把校長的小感謝便條裱框，掛在電腦教室裡。

all.en: By the end of the school year, twenty-two schools across the country were running FindIt daily.
all.zh: 到了學年結束時，全國有二十二所學校每天都在運行 FindIt。

all.en: Yu-chen began planning a college application essay about how one small idea quietly changed lives.
all.zh: 宇辰開始規劃一篇大學申請自傳，主題是一個小點子如何悄悄改變了人們的生活。

all.en: Yu-chen was accepted into his first-choice computer science program with a partial merit scholarship.
all.zh: 宇辰錄取了他第一志願的資訊工程系，並獲得部分獎學金。

all.en: Po-ya chose to study interaction design at a small art university across the river from his campus.
all.zh: 柏雅選擇到他校園對岸河邊的一所小型藝術大學念互動設計。

all.en: They handed FindIt over to a new student team and offered weekly remote advice via video calls.
all.zh: 他們把 FindIt 交棒給新的學生團隊，並透過視訊每週提供遠端建議。

all.en: The new team added a chat feature in the second semester, exactly as Yu-chen had originally planned.
all.zh: 新團隊在第二學期加入了聊天功能，正如宇辰當初的規劃。

all.en: Yu-chen began working part-time at a small startup that built educational apps for elementary schools.
all.zh: 宇辰開始在一家專為小學設計教育 App 的小型新創公司兼職。

all.en: He saved every paycheck to buy a proper development laptop and a tall ergonomic office chair.
all.zh: 他把每一份薪水都存起來，買了一台真正的開發筆電和一張人體工學椅。

all.en: Po-ya designed the mascot Sniffer onto a small enamel pin and mailed one to every original club member.
all.zh: 柏雅把吉祥物嗅嗅做成小型琺瑯徽章，並寄了一枚給每位社團創始成員。

all.en: Ms. Chen retired the following summer but visited the lab every month with homemade pineapple cakes.
all.zh: 陳老師隔年夏天退休，但每個月都會帶著自製鳳梨酥到電腦教室拜訪。

all.en: Yu-chen and Po-ya started dating quietly in their second year of college, surprising absolutely no one.
all.zh: 宇辰和柏雅在大二時悄悄交往，這個結果一點都沒讓任何人意外。

all.en: Their first joint project was a tiny app reminding elderly grandparents to drink water throughout the day.
all.zh: 他們合作的第一個專案是一個小型 App，提醒年長的爺爺奶奶整天記得喝水。
